mapper.select: SELECT u.target_total_stock AS target_total_stock, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT st.item_id) FROM stocks st JOIN items i ON st.item_id = i.id WHERE i.user_id = u.id AND st.status = 'IN_STOCK') AS total_item_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks st JOIN items i ON st.item_id = i.id WHERE i.user_id = u.id AND st.status = 'IN_STOCK') AS total_stock_count, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(st.price, i.price)), 0) FROM stocks st JOIN items i ON st.item_id = i.id WHERE i.user_id = u.id AND st.status = 'IN_STOCK') AS total_value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks st JOIN items i ON st.item_id = i.id WHERE i.user_id = u.id AND st.status = 'DISPATCHED') AS dispatched_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks st JOIN items i ON st.item_id = i.id WHERE i.user_id = u.id AND st.status = 'LOST') AS lost_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks st JOIN items i ON st.item_id = i.id WHERE i.user_id = u.id AND st.status = 'DAMAGED') AS damaged_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks st JOIN items i ON st.item_id = i.id WHERE i.user_id = u.id AND st.status = 'DISPOSED') AS disposed_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks st JOIN items i ON st.item_id = i.id WHERE i.user_id = u.id AND st.status = 'IN_STOCK' AND st.is_kept = TRUE) AS kept_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks st JOIN items i ON st.item_id = i.id WHERE i.user_id = u.id AND st.status = 'IN_STOCK' AND st.expiration_date IS NOT NULL AND st.expiration_date >= #{today} AND st.expiration_date <= #{soonCutoff}) AS expiring_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stocks st JOIN items i ON st.item_id = i.id WHERE i.user_id = u.id AND st.status = 'IN_STOCK' AND st.expiration_date IS NOT NULL AND st.expiration_date < #{today}) AS expired_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spaces sp WHERE sp.user_id = u.id) AS space_count FROM users u WHERE u.id = #{userId}
